title: ChargePoint Completes Major EV Network Expansion, Doubles Colorado's Fast Charging Coverage
text: ChargePoint and the Colorado Energy Office completed six EV fast charging corridors across Colorado, installing 33 DC fast charging sites with over 80 charging ports. The $12 million project, funded by $10 million in state funding and $2 million from private and local government partners, has doubled the state's highway fast charging coverage from 40% to nearly 80% of corridors within 30 miles of a fast charger. This project demonstrates ChargePoint's ability to execute large-scale infrastructure deployments with public-private partnerships.
